message:
Thanks! Your photo is now showing on the Selah display!

Tip: You can schedule a photo for a special date (like a birthday or anniversary) by including the date in your subject line. For example:

  Subject: Happy Birthday Mom May 10
  Subject: Anniversary 2026-06-15

The first sentence of your email becomes the caption shown under the photo. Send as many photos as you like!

Thanks! Your photo is queued to display on {date}.

The first sentence of your email will appear as the caption under the photo. You can send more photos anytime — just email them to this address!

Tip: If you want a photo to show right away instead of on a specific date, just leave the date out of the subject line.

Thanks for your photo! It's been added to the Selah display.

Here's how to get the most out of it:

  • To schedule a photo for a specific date, put the date in the subject line (e.g. "Happy Birthday Dad June 20" or "2026-12-25")
  • To display immediately, just send without a date
  • The first sentence of your email becomes the caption shown under the photo
  • You can send JPG, PNG, or even MP4/MOV videos

Keep the photos coming!
